name: Lipton Recipe Secrets Golden Lemon Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 package Lipton Recipe Secrets Golden-Herb with Lemon Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the chicken in egg, then coat with flour.
2. In a skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
3. Brown the chicken for 4 minutes, turning once.
4. Stir in the Lipton Golden-Herb with Lemon Soup Mix blended with water.
5. Arrange lemon slices on top of the chicken.
6. Bring to a boil and simmer covered for 10 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
7. Makes about 4 servings. Serve with Lipton Golden Saute Chicken Broccoli Angel Hair Pasta.
